summary: Matriz de Producción - Colores Feature testing completed. Backend: 10/10 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified working correctly. The new color display feature (popup/modal instead of column) is fully functional.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/matriz - returns colores array at fila level with color_general field
Backend: GET /api/reportes-produccion/matriz - returns colores array at detalle level with color_general field
Backend: color_general values include expected values (Celeste, Azul, Maiz)
Backend: colores_resumen field exists at both fila and detalle level
Backend: colores cantidad and registros are integers
Frontend: Main table does NOT have 'Colores' column (removed as requested)
Frontend: Main table has correct columns: Item, Hilo, estados, Total
Frontend: TOTALES row has correct colSpan=2 (Item + Hilo columns)
Frontend: Clicking on item row opens modal with 'Registros' and 'Colores' tabs
Frontend: Registros tab shows table without Colores column
Frontend: Colores tab shows ColoresTable with columns: Color General, Color, Registros, Cantidad Total
Frontend: ColoresTable groups colors by Color General with subtotals
Frontend: Clicking on numeric cell opens modal filtered by estado
Frontend: Modal title shows filter (e.g., 'Item → Estampado')
Frontend: Colores tab reflects only colors from filtered registros
critical_code_review_comments: All requested features have been implemented correctly:
1. 'Colores' column removed from main table - VERIFIED
3. ColoresTable shows Color General grouping with subtotals - VERIFIED
4. Cell click filters registros by estado and colors reflect filtered data - VERIFIED
5. TOTALES row colSpan=2 for Item+Hilo columns - VERIFIED
6. Backend returns color_general field in colores arrays - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Used existing data. Registro 03 (corte 03) has colors distributed across Color Generales: Celeste (Celeste, Celeste Claro, Celeste Oscuro), Azul (Azul, Azul Claro, Azul Oscuro), Maiz (Maiz Claro).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matriz de Producción colores feature fully tested. Backend endpoint /api/reportes-produccion/matriz returns colores with color_general field at both fila and detalle levels. Frontend shows colors in a modal tab (ColoresTable component) instead of a column in the main table. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_matriz_colores.py with 10 tests. Data-testids: matriz-produccion, matriz-table, item-click-{idx}, cell-{idx}-{estado}, detalle-modal, vista-registros, vista-colores.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a feature implementation, not a bug fix. The feature request was to change how colors are displayed in the Matriz de Producción from a column in the main table to a popup/modal with grouped colors by Color General.
